action.leaderTurn: 👑 輪到你了！請選擇任務隊伍 (Your turn — select a quest team)
action.voteTurn: 🗳️ 輪到你投票！贊成或拒絕此隊伍 (Your turn to vote — approve or reject)

action.assassinTurn: 🗡️ 你是刺客！選擇目標刺殺梅林 (You are the Assassin — choose your target)

assassin.title: 🗡️ 刺殺梅林 (Assassinate Merlin)
assassin.prompt: 你認為誰是梅林？選擇你的目標 (Who do you think is Merlin? Choose your target)

assassin.pickingTarget: 刺客正在選擇目標，試圖找出梅林... (The Assassin is choosing a target, trying to find Merlin...)
assassin.warning: 若刺客成功刺殺梅林，邪惡方獲勝！(If the Assassin kills Merlin, Evil wins!)
